name: @krewbot/platform-core
description: Self-hosted core for the krewbot platform — CDK stacks and Lambda code intended to be deployable into a customer-owned AWS account.

scripts.build:chat-server: cd docker/agent/chat-server && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:chat-server
scripts.test: npm run test:cdk && npm run test:python
